text:
and so the widow would be a relation
Venus
Sun Mars of the mother of the native. She would
Mer.
be beautiful. The native would have
illicit connection with that widow resulting in pregnancy. He would
then bring some poison and give it to the girl to destroy pregnancy.
Venus representing her meets his enemies the Sun and Jupiter in
the next house to Libra and so she would become very weak and die
as a result of poisoning. For this offence the native had to undergo
living in Naraka and after that got this birth. The remnant effects will
give ill-health to his children, trials and troubles in life. He, too,
should perform the Somavara Vratam (religious performance on
Mondays) to get relief.
He will have good education, own landed property and money-He
will have two boys and two girls and also see grand children.
CHART 11
The native is capable of
winning over every one by Rahu Mars
his pleasant manners, simple
Jupt.
and unoffending nature (2nd
house to Jupiter occupied by Venus
